title: pteridium aquilinum var. lanuginosum
intro: Pteridium aquilinum var. lanuginosum, also known as the woolly bracken or woolly fern, is a variety of the bracken fern (Pteridium aquilinum) that is commonly found in North America and Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The woolly bracken is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
